---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Current

**Econometria** (Laurea in Economia e Finanza) — Sapienza - TA, 2025/26
[Course Material (in Italian)](https://andrerecio.github.io/econometria-triennale/)


## Past

**Econometria** (Prof. Giuseppe Ragusa) — Sapienza - TA, 2024/25

**Politica Economica** — Sapienza - TA, 2024/25
